case.title: YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U.S. BUREAU OF PRISONS

opinion.h1: YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U.S. BUREAU OF PRISONS, 386 U.S. 546 (1967)
386 U.S. 546"> YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U.S. BUREAU OF PRISONS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE MIDDLE DISTRICT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 1317, Misc. Decided April 10, 1967.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction.
